'''âk-ng-sh''' ('''kangasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrichotomize|quadrichotomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrichotomize|quadrichotomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-ng-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kangasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangashithi|kangashithi]] || [[word:kangashiji|kangashiji]] || [[word:kangashishi|kangashishi]] || [[word:kangashi|kangashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangashuthuth|kangashuthuth]] || [[word:kangashujuj|kangashujuj]] || [[word:kangashushush|kangashushush]] || [[word:kangash|kangash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangashuthu|kangashuthu]] || [[word:kangashuju|kangashuju]] || [[word:kangashushu|kangashushu]] || [[word:kangashu|kangashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangashufuth|kangashufuth]] || [[word:kangashufuj|kangashufuj]] || [[word:kangashufush|kangashufush]] || [[word:kangashuf|kangashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangashethe|kangashethe]] || [[word:kangasheje|kangasheje]] || [[word:kangasheshe|kangasheshe]] || [[word:kangashe|kangashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangashothoth|kangashothoth]] || [[word:kangashojoj|kangashojoj]] || [[word:kangashoshosh|kangashoshosh]] || [[word:kangash|kangash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangashotho|kangashotho]] || [[word:kangashojo|kangashojo]] || [[word:kangashosho|kangashosho]] || [[word:kangasho|kangasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangashofoth|kangashofoth]] || [[word:kangashofoj|kangashofoj]] || [[word:kangashofosh|kangashofosh]] || [[word:kangashof|kangashof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangashĂŻfĂŻf|kangashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻfĂŻf|kangashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻfĂŻf|kangashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻfĂŻf|kangashĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]] || [[word:kangashĂŻf|kangashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangashĂŠthĂŠ|kangashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kangashĂŠjĂŠ|kangashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kangashĂŠshĂŠ|kangashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kangashĂŠ|kangashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangashathath|kangashathath]] || [[word:kangashajaj|kangashajaj]] || [[word:kangashashash|kangashashash]] || [[word:kangash|kangash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangashatha|kangashatha]] || [[word:kangashaja|kangashaja]] || [[word:kangashasha|kangashasha]] || [[word:kangasha|kangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangashafath|kangashafath]] || [[word:kangashafaj|kangashafaj]] || [[word:kangashafash|kangashafash]] || [[word:kangashaf|kangashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kangashasha|kangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokangashasha|gokangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikangashasha|gokikangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kangashnĂŒsha|kangashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokangashnknĂŒsha|gokangashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikangashnĂŒsha|gokikangashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kangashshĂ«sha|kangashshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokangashnkshĂ«sha|gokangashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikangashshĂ«sha|gokikangashshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangashrosha|kangashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangashnkrosha|gokangashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangashrosha|gokikangashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kangashmusha|kangashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangashnkmusha|gokangashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangashmusha|gokikangashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kangashsherasha|kangashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokangashnksherasha|gokangashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikangashsherasha|gokikangashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kangashngasha|kangashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokangashnkngasha|gokangashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikangashngasha|gokikangashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kangashyasha|kangashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokangashnkyasha|gokangashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikangashyasha|gokikangashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kangashyamasha|kangashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokangashnkyamasha|gokangashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikangashyamasha|gokikangashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangashnĂŒshĂ«sha|kangashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokangashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikangashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangashnĂŒrosha|kangashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangashnknĂŒrosha|gokangashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangashnĂŒrosha|gokikangashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangashnĂŒmusha|kangashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangashnknĂŒmusha|gokangashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangashnĂŒmusha|gokikangashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangashshĂ«nĂŒsha|kangashshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokangashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangashshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikangashshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangashshĂ«rosha|kangashshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangashnkshĂ«rosha|gokangashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangashshĂ«rosha|gokikangashshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangashshĂ«musha|kangashshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangashnkshĂ«musha|gokangashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangashshĂ«musha|gokikangashshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangashronĂŒsha|kangashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangashnkronĂŒsha|gokangashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangashronĂŒsha|gokikangashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangashroshĂ«sha|kangashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangashnkroshĂ«sha|gokangashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangashroshĂ«sha|gokikangashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangashromusha|kangashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangashnkromusha|gokangashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangashromusha|gokikangashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangashmunĂŒsha|kangashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangashnkmunĂŒsha|gokangashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangashmunĂŒsha|gokikangashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangashmushĂ«sha|kangashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangashnkmushĂ«sha|gokangashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangashmushĂ«sha|gokikangashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangashmurosha|kangashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangashnkmurosha|gokangashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangashmurosha|gokikangashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kangash|kangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠsh|kĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokangash|hokangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠngĂŠsh|hokĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokangash|hohokangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠngĂŠsh|hohokĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkangash|nĂŒkangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠngĂŠsh|nĂŒkĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkangash|nĂŒnĂŒkangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠngĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkangash|nĂŻkangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠngĂŠsh|nĂŻkĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkangash|nĂŻnĂŻkangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠngĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukangash|lukangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠngĂŠsh|lukĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukangash|lulukangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠngĂŠsh|lulukĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likangash|likangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠngĂŠsh|likĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikangash|lilikangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠngĂŠsh|lilikĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokangash|kokangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠngĂŠsh|kokĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokangash|kokokangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠngĂŠsh|kokokĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekangash|kekangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠngĂŠsh|kekĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekangash|kekekangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠngĂŠsh|kekekĂŠngĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
